comparison_spec.description: Structured XY family with nontrivial block-dependent azimuths.
comparison_spec.formula: theta_n = min(0.26 pi + 0.13 pi n, 0.88 pi), phi_n = (0.20 + 0.37 n) pi mod 2 pi

load_instructions: Load `chi_plus_chiprime_structured_xy_na3_chiT5p0_echo_replay_ideal.json` as JSON and inspect the documented result rows and metadata.
